leadText: Coconut Milk (Japanese: ヤシのミルク Coconut Milk) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The refined sweetness of this coconut milk makes it quite popular.

sections.title: In the core series games

The refined sweetness of this coconut milk makes it quite popular. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh Rolling Fields , Hammerlocke Hills , Fields of Honor ( Ingredients Seller ) Possible gift after cooking curry
